metadata.description: Orchestrates codebase scanning and import mapping for project visualization.
Decision guide for delegating tasks to caveman-style subagents to save context tokens.
Generates terse Conventional Commits messages focused on technical intent.
Reduces context overhead by compressing project memory files into caveman format.
Core logic for file compression, validation, and Claude API orchestration.
CLI entry point for the caveman-compress tool.
Measures token savings and validates compression quality.

tour.title: Welcome to Digital SAT
tour.description: High-level overview of the Digital SAT Online Testing System. This project clones the Bluebook experience while providing advanced scoring analytics.

tour.title: Core Domain Model - Tests & Modules
tour.description: Explore the hierarchical structure of tests. Tests are divided into Sections (Reading & Writing, Math), which are further split into Modules (Adaptive Step 1 and Step 2).

tour.title: Question Bank & Item Parameters
tour.description: The heart of the adaptive engine. Each question stores Item Response Theory (IRT) parameters: Difficulty (b), Discrimination (a), and Guessing (c).

tour.title: User Authentication
tour.description: Secure access for Students and Admins. This controller handles web-based authentication and role-based redirects.

tour.title: The Test Engine - Core JS
tour.description: The client-side 'brain' of the simulator. It manages the timer, question state, and UI updates to mimic the Bluebook app exactly.

tour.title: Adaptive Routing Logic
tour.description: Understand the logic that determines if a student moves to the 'Easy' or 'Hard' Module 2 based on their performance in Module 1.

tour.title: Module Submission & Backend Flow
tour.description: Handles the persistence of student answers and triggers the scoring pipeline when a module or test is completed.

tour.title: Advanced Scoring Pipeline (IRT/MLE)
tour.description: Deep dive into the IRT (3-Parameter Logistic) model. It uses Maximum Likelihood Estimation via Newton-Raphson to estimate student Theta.

tour.title: Student Analytics Dashboard
tour.description: How performance data is presented back to the student. Charts and domain-level analysis help students identify their weaknesses.

tour.title: Bulk Content Management
tour.description: The administrative side of the system. Bulk import large question sets from CSV, JSON, or ZIP packages with media handling.
